gpt_comment: ⚠️[DIVERGENT]. Meteoblue forecasts a dry day whereas the baseline predicts 61% chance of rain. Temperature and rain values from YR.no and Météo Belgique are not stated. Seems like today's weather in Brussels is as unpredictable as a monkey on a trampoline.
